channel.title: 2026-04-08 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-04-08 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: A brief review of quantum machine learning techniques for financial services
item.description:
📚 Machine Learning: Science and Technology
👤 Mina Doosti, Petros Wallden, Conor Brian Hamill, Robert Hankache, Oliver Thomson Brown and Chris Heunen
This review paper examines state-of-the-art algorithms and techniques in quantum machine learning (QML) with potential applications in finance. We discuss QML techniques in supervised learning tasks, such as quantum variational classifiers, quantum Kernel estimation, and quantum neural networks, along with quantum generative AI techniques like quantum transformers and quantum graph neural networks. The financial applications considered include risk management, credit scoring, fraud detection, and stock price prediction. We also provide an overview of the challenges, potential, and limitations of QML, both in these specific areas and more broadly across the field. We hope that this can serve as a quick guide for data scientists, professionals in the financial sector, and enthusiasts in thi…

item.title: Classical neural networks on quantum devices via tensor network disentanglers: A case study in image classification
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Research
👤 Borja Aizpurua, Sukhbinder Singh, and Román Orús
Author(s): Borja Aizpurua, Sukhbinder Singh, and Román Orús We address the problem of implementing bottleneck layers from classical pretrained neural networks on a quantum computer, with the goal of exploring intrinsically quantum ansatz for representing large linear layers within hybrid classical-quantum models. Our approach begins with a compression step i… [Phys. Rev. Research 8, 023030] Published Wed Apr 08, 2026

item.title: EquiHGNN: Scalable rotationally equivariant hypergraph neural networks
item.description:
📚 The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue
Molecular interactions often involve higher-order relationships that cannot be fully captured by traditional graph-based models limited to pairwise connections. Hypergraphs naturally extend graphs by enabling multi-way interactions, making them well-suited for modeling complex molecular systems. In this work, we introduce EquiHGNN , an equi variant h yper g raph n eural n etwork framework that integrates symmetry-aware representations to improve molecular modeling. By enforcing the equivariance under relevant transformation groups, our approach preserves geometric and topological properties, leading to more robust and physically meaningful representations. We examine a range of equivariant architectures and demonstrate that integrating symmetry constraints leads to notable performance gai…

item.title: Machine-learned many-body potentials for charged colloids reveal gas–liquid spinodal instabilities only in the strong-coupling regime of primitive models
item.description:
📚 The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue
Past experimental observations of gas–liquid and gas–crystal coexistence in low-salinity suspensions of highly charged colloids have suggested the existence of like-charge attraction. Evidence for this phenomenon was also observed in primitive-model simulations of (asymmetric) electrolytes and of low-charge nanoparticle dispersions. These results from low-valency simulations have often been extrapolated to experimental parameter regimes of high colloid valency, where like-charge attraction between colloids has been reported. However, direct simulations of highly charged colloids remain computationally demanding. To circumvent slow equilibration, we employ a machine-learning (ML) framework to construct ML potentials that accurately describe the effective colloid interactions. Our ML potent…

item.title: Quantum coherence in neuromorphic computing
item.description:
📚 The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue
Quantum effects become significant when hardware computing units scale down to nanoscale dimensions. To maintain reliable performance as neuromorphic computing hardware scales down, researchers must understand how quantum coherence across multiple neurons impacts neural network function. In this study, we model neuromorphic computing with quantum coherence effects using a quantum spiking neural network model. We find that quantum coherence between neural activations can alter the network perception, compared to the incoherent network. Destructive interference between activation signals propagating through different synaptic channels drives this effect at the quantum scale. This quantum effect becomes more prominent with increasing network depth and can be mitigated by increasing the numbe…

item.title: Quantum reservoir computing for realized volatility forecasting
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Research
👤 Qingyu Li, Chiranjib Mukhopadhyay, Abolfazl Bayat, and Ali Habibnia
Author(s): Qingyu Li, Chiranjib Mukhopadhyay, Abolfazl Bayat, and Ali Habibnia Recent advances in quantum computing have demonstrated its potential to significantly enhance the analysis and forecasting of complex classical data. Among these, quantum reservoir computing (QRC) has emerged as a particularly powerful approach, combining quantum computation with machine learning fo… [Phys. Rev. Research 8, 023028] Published Wed Apr 08, 2026

item.title: Smooth overlap of spin orientations: Machine learning exchange fields for ab initio spin dynamics
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Yuqiang Gao, Menno Bokdam, and Paul J. Kelly
Author(s): Yuqiang Gao, Menno Bokdam, and Paul J. Kelly Ab initio molecular dynamics (AIMD) refers to the solution of Newton's equations of motion for ions with forces fᵢ=−∂E/∂Rᵢ calculated from self-consistent electronic structure calculations. So-called machine-learning force field (ML-FF) schemes parametrize the potential… [Phys. Rev. B 113, 144413] Published Wed Apr 08, 2026

item.title: Thermometry of simulated Bose–Einstein condensates using machine learning
item.description:
📚 Machine Learning: Science and Technology
👤 Jack Griffiths, Steven A Wrathmall and Simon A Gardiner
Precise determination of thermodynamic parameters in ultracold Bose gases remains challenging due to the destructive nature of conventional measurement techniques and inherent experimental uncertainties. We demonstrate a machine learning approach for rapid, minimally destructive estimation of the chemical potential and temperature from a single image of an in situ imaged density profiles of finite-temperature Bose gases. Our convolutional neural network is trained exclusively on quasi-two-dimensional ‘pancake’ condensates in harmonic trap configurations. It achieves parameter extraction within fractions of a second. The model also demonstrates some zero-shot generalisation across both trap geometry and thermalisation dynamics, successfully estimating the temperature (although not the chem…

item.title: Decoupling thermo-mechanical signals in ionic hydrogels via deep operator networks
item.description:
📚 The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue
In responsive hydrogels, concurrent thermal and mechanical stimuli induce inseparable electrical signals due to the superposition of the ionic thermoelectric and piezoionic effects, a fundamental challenge in soft ionotronics. To address this, we propose the T-DeepONet model, which integrates the superior temporal modeling capability of the transformer with the spatial encoding of the deep operator network (DeepONet) to learn the complex thermo-mechanical operator. The model is trained on a comprehensive synthetic dataset generated from experimentally validated finite element simulations, enabling T-DeepONet to map the coupled voltage fields to independent temperature and pressure distributions. By integrating transformer-based temporal modeling with DeepONet’s spatial encoding, T-DeepONe…

item.title: Understanding twist-disorder of polytetrafluoroethylene (PTFE) chains using neural network potential molecular dynamics
item.description:
📚 The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue
Molecular dynamics (MD) calculations are used to characterize the temperature-dependent evolution of helicity and twist disorder in polytetrafluoroethylene (PTFE) chains. The MD calculations employ machine-learned neural network potentials (NNPs) trained on density functional theory data. In particular, NNPs were derived using three functionals: PBE-D3, r 2 SCAN, and r 2 SCAN-rVV10. As temperature increases, for PBE-D3 and r 2 SCAN-rVV10, we observe gradual unwinding from the equilibrium helix to less twisted, increasingly disordered conformations, with distinct discontinuous transitions near 250 K (PBE-D3) and 410 K (r 2 SCAN-rVV10). Notably, the PBE-D3 NNP captures these transitions and associated structural changes most accurately, whereas the r 2 SCAN-rVV10 NNP shows similar phase beh…

item.title: sFWI: physics-informed score-based generative modeling for robust full waveform inversion
item.description:
📚 Machine Learning: Science and Technology
👤 Zicheng Gai and Yanfei Wang
Full waveform inversion (FWI) is an important geophysical imaging technique with applications in hydrocarbon exploration, subsurface carbon storage, and earthquake hazard assessment. However, FWI’s efficacy is greatly affected by its ill-posed, nonlinear and non-convex nature, whose effects in turn make FWI heavily reliant on the initial model to avoid convergence to a local minimum. While recent artificial intelligence-based approaches aim to address these issues, they often employ deterministic frameworks that reinforce the problem’s inherent ambiguity by enforcing rigid one-to-one mappings. To mitigate these limitations, we propose score-based FWI (sFWI), a physics-informed generative framework that employs score-based diffusion to reformulate the FWI process. Rather than deterministic…

item.title: Ab initio derivation of the crystal field parameters for lanthanide ions: The f 1 case
item.description:
📚 The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue
The crystal field theory as explained by Abragam and Bleaney in their landmark 1970 book on transition-ion electron paramagnetic resonance remains a cornerstone in the development of luminescence applications and molecular magnets based on the f -elements. The modern numerical derivation of the 27 Bkq Stevens crystal field parameters (CFPs), which describe the splitting of the energy levels of a central ion, is traditionally achieved through the effective Hamiltonian theory and multiconfiguration wave function theory calculations, insofar as the lowest J level fully captures the targeted low-energy physics. In this study, we present a novel theoretical approach for determining the CFPs. The procedure resembles the traditional extraction path but crucially accounts for the full | J , M J ⟩…

item.title: Origin of heteroatom substitution effects on hyperfine coupling in muoniated radicals: A path-integral molecular dynamics study
item.description:
📚 The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue
Muonium (Mu) represents a powerful probe of radical electronic structure owing to its hyperfine coupling constant (HFCC). In this study, we investigate the influence of heteroatom substitution on the HFCC of Mu through ab initio path integral molecular dynamics simulations on muoniated xanthene-9-thione ( μ -XT) and thioxanthene-9-thione ( μ -TXT). The simulations reproduce the experimental trend that μ -XT exhibits a larger HFCC than μ -TXT, highlighting the crucial influence of nuclear quantum effects on the local structure around Mu. The Mu–S bond exhibits nearly identical behavior in both molecules and, therefore, does not explain the observed difference in the HFCC. In contrast, the dihedral angle between the S–Mu bond and the molecular framework considerably affects the HFCC. In par…

item.title: Stabilizing the Lattice Oxygen Oxidation Pathway via a Dynamic Hydrogen‐Bond Network for Industrial‐Current Seawater Electrolysis
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Ke Liu, Kaiyuan Deng, Xin Zhang, Lei Lei, Zhaoqin Chu, Xun Chen, Yanming Li, Xu Han, Xiao Guo, Degao Wang
Advanced Materials, EarlyView.

item.title: 扭转范德华反铁磁体中的交错磁性磁子
item.description:
📚 Nano Letters: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
👤 Qirui Cui, Xiaocheng Bai, Yuqing Ge, Alexander Edström, Cong Li, Yasmine Sassa, Cheng Song, Kaiyou Wang, and Anna Delin
该工作报道在扭转范德华反铁磁体中发现交错磁性磁子（altermagnetic magnons）的研究，由Qirui Cui、Anna Delin、Kaiyou Wang等合作完成，发表于Nano Letters。该研究围绕低维磁性材料中新型磁子激发模式展开，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 铁电超晶格中相界介导的极化涡旋非易失开关
item.description:
📚 Nano Letters: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
👤 Di Fan, Jianhua Ren, Jianwei Liang, Yonglan Hou, Tongfei Zhang, Yi Zhang, Weijin Chen, and Congbing Tan
该工作报道利用相界工程实现铁电超晶格中极化涡旋非易失性开关的研究，由Di Fan、Congbing Tan等合作完成，发表于Nano Letters。该研究围绕铁电纳米结构中拓扑缺陷的电控行为展开，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 独立超薄铁电氧化物中的可切换拓扑极化织构
item.description:
📚 Nano Letters: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
👤 Franco N. Di Rino and Tim Verhagen
该工作报道在独立超薄铁电氧化物中实现可切换拓扑极化织构的研究，由Franco N. Di Rino和Tim Verhagen完成，发表于Nano Letters。该研究围绕低维铁电材料中的拓扑极化态调控展开，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 二维Ruddlesden-Popper氮化物钙钛矿中竞争极化畸变实现超低势垒反铁电-铁电转变
item.description:
📚 Nano Letters: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
👤 Shuyi Lin, Qiong Lei, and Jun Yin
该工作报道二维Ruddlesden-Popper氮化物钙钛矿中，通过竞争极化畸变机制实现超低势垒反铁电-铁电相变的研究，由林书逸、雷琼和殷俊合作完成，发表于Nano Letters。该研究围绕低维铁电/反铁电材料的相变调控展开，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 柔性多孔配位聚合物中的给体-受体堆叠实现室温铁电性
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Adrija Ghosh, Surabhi Menon, Supriya Sahoo, Devika Surendran, Nilotpal Deka, Jan K. Zaręba, Ramamoorthy Boomishankar, Umesh V. Waghmare, Tapas Kumar Maji
该工作报道在柔性多孔配位聚合物中构建给体-受体堆叠结构以获得室温铁电性的研究，由Adrija Ghosh、Tapas Kumar Maji等合作完成，发表于Angewandte Chemie International Edition。该研究围绕分子基铁电材料的设计与性能展开，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 极磁体NiCo2TeO₆的动态磁电效应和磁致伸缩
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Yingjie He, Zhongyuan Liu, Xiaonan Yuan, Xiaocheng Hong, Deshun Hong, and Young Sun
作者：何英杰、刘忠源、袁晓楠、洪晓成、洪德顺和孙杨 Ni₃TeO₆是一种极性磁体，在高磁场（≈9phantomůle0.28em0exT）下具有明显的磁电（ME）效应。在 Ni₃TeO₆ 中用 Co 代替 Ni 可调节磁性结构并降低临界……[Phys。 Rev. B 113, 144412] 2026 年 4 月 8 日星期三发布

item.title: 勘误：二维磁性异质结构中隧穿谱学探测分数化激发的研究[Phys. Rev. B 102, 085412 (2020)]
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Matteo Carrega, Ivan J. Vera-Marun, and Alessandro Principi
该文为前述关于二维磁性异质结构中隧穿谱学探测分数化激发的正式勘误，修正了原文中的相关表述或数据，具体更正内容需查阅原文。

item.title: 硅衬底上分子束外延生长超薄Cr₂Ge₂Te₆薄膜的铁磁性：直至单层极限
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Pengfei Ji, Ruixuan Liu, Tianchen Zhu, Yang Chen, Yitian Tong, Jinxuan Liang, Yunhe Bai, Yunyi Zang, Zuhan Geng, Fangting Chen, Xiyu Hong, Jiatong Zhang, Luyi Yang, Qi‐Kun Xue, Ke He, Xiao Feng
该工作围绕硅衬底上分子束外延生长的超薄Cr₂Ge₂Te₆薄膜展开，系统研究了其铁磁性质随厚度减薄至单层极限的演变规律。研究为二维范德华磁性材料在硅基平台上的集成应用提供了重要参考，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: Fiber-integrated N- V diamond magnetometer compatible with commercial endoscopic systems
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Applied
👤 Satbir Singh, Hyunjong Lee, Nhu Anh Nguyen, Seonghyeon Kang, Jeong Hyun Shim, Sangwon Oh, and Kwang-Geol Lee
Author(s): Satbir Singh, Hyunjong Lee, Nhu Anh Nguyen, Seonghyeon Kang, Jeong Hyun Shim, Sangwon Oh, and Kwang-Geol Lee The nitrogen-vacancy (N- V ) center in diamond provides a robust, solid-state platform for magnetic field measurements at room temperature. To harness its potential in inspecting inaccessible regions, here we present a compact endoscopic configuration of a N- V diamond–based magne… [Phys. Rev. Applied 25, 044019] Published Wed Apr 08, 2026

item.title: 纳米限制中的弗里德尔振荡 ⁴He
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.
👤 Bernd Rosenow and Adrian Del Maestro
作者：Bernd Rosenow 和 Adrian Del Maestro 一维玻色子系统，例如限制在纳米孔中的氦，表现出以密度波作为集体激发的 Luttinger 液体行为。我们研究了散射势对低维量子液体的影响。我们考虑 ⁴mathrm{… [Phys.莱特牧师。 136, 146002] 2026 年 4 月 8 日星期三发布

item.title: 高效磁机械谐振器用于增强极低频磁场通信与无线能量传输
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Zhi Cheng, Zhuangzhuang He, Zhaoqiang Chu, Jianglei Chang, Chunli Zhang, Penghong Ci, Jing Zhou, Shuxiang Dong
该工作设计并制备了一种高效率磁机械谐振器，用于增强极低频（ELF）磁场通信和无线能量传输性能。该器件在深海通信、地下探测等极端环境应用中具有重要潜力，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 磁性纳米棒诱导构建多响应各向异性纳米纤维素薄膜用于增强摩擦纳米发电机输出
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Tianyu Wang, Chengqi Feng, Juncheng Huang, Chao Fang, Lixin Song, Haining Na, Jin Zhu
该工作利用磁性纳米棒作为结构导向单元，构建了具有多响应特性的各向异性纳米纤维素薄膜，显著提升了摩擦纳米发电机（TENG）的电学输出性能。研究为柔性能量收集器件的功能化设计提供了新策略，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 铌酸锂微环谐振器中的无磁光模简并提升
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.
👤 Xin-Biao Xu, Zheng-Xu Zhu, Yuan-Hao Yang, Jia-Qi Wang, Yu Zeng, Jia-Hua Zou, Juanjuan Lu, Yan-Lei Zhang, Weiting Wang, Guang-Can Guo, Luyan Sun, and Chang-Ling Zou
作者：Xin-Biao Xu、Zheng-Xu Zhu、Yuan-Hao Yang、Jia-Qi Wang、Yu Zeng、Jia-Hua Zou、Juanjuan Lu、Yan-Lei Zhu、Weiting Wang、Guang-CanGuo、Luyan Sun 和 Chang-Ling 在无磁场的集成光子学中打破时间反转对称性仍然是一个基本挑战。我们通过直接提升微环谐振器中的前向-后向模式简并性来证明声子引起的非互易性。相干声光耦合产生差分交流电……[物理。莱特牧师。 136、

item.title: 分子中电子磁性的测量
item.description:
📚 Physics
👤 Marric Stephens
对简单分子离子进行精密光谱测量，为量子电动力学的严格检验开辟新途径。该工作围绕分子离子电子磁矩的高精度测定展开，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: Λ(1520) 和 Λ(1690) 到 γΣ⁰ 的电磁辐射衰变观测
item.description: 📚 Phys. Rev. Lett. 👤 M. Ablikim et al. (BESIII Collaboration) 作者：M. Ablikim 等人。 （BESIII 合作）利用 BESIII 探测器收集的 (10087±44)×10⁶ J/ψ 事件，我们对 J/ψ→ΛøverlineΛγ 和 ΛøverlineΣ⁰γ 过程中的共振结构进行了研究，报告了电磁辐射的首次观测......莱特牧师。 136, 141801] 2026 年 4 月 8 日星期三发布

item.title: 五边形二维交错磁体：材料筛选与交错磁隧道结器件应用
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Jianhua Wang, Xingyue Yang, Zongmeng Yang, Jing Lu, Pin Ho, Wenhong Wang, Yee Sin Ang, Zhenxiang Cheng, Shibo Fang
该工作系统筛选了具有五边形结构的二维交错磁性材料，并探索了其在交错磁隧道结器件中的应用潜力。研究为新型自旋电子学器件的设计提供了材料基础和物理机制指导，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 利用最大熵冻结量化QCD临界点的涨落特征
item.description:
📚 Editors' Suggestions
👤 Jamie M. Karthein, Krishna Rajagopal, Maneesha Pradeep, Mikhail Stephanov, and Yi Yin
若量子色动力学在有限化学势相图中存在临界点，其属于三维伊辛模型普适类。作者从伊辛模型性质出发，假设热平衡与冻结时最大熵，首次定量研究临界点对Collider粒子物理实验的启示，给出重离子碰撞中质子数逐事件涨落的预测，为将来实验探测临界点提供可能判据。

item.title: 交变磁序的量子杂质传感
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.
👤 V. A. S. V. Bittencourt, Hossein Hosseinabadi, Jairo Sinova, Libor Šmejkal, and Jamir Marino
作者：V. A. S. V. Bittencourt、Hossein Hosseinabadi、Jairo Sinova、Libor Šmejkal 和 Jamir Marino 具有单个自旋缺陷的量子传感已成为探测凝聚态物质系统微观特性的多功能平台。在这里，我们证明了金刚石中氮空位（NV）中心的量子弛豫可以揭示交变磁绝缘体的各向异性自旋动力学...... [Phys。莱特牧师。 136, 146701] 2026 年 4 月 8 日星期三发布

item.title: 通过铁电基板重新审视双层 CrI₃ 中磁性的非易失性控制
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Bin Wu, Wenfang Deng, Zhigang Gui, and Li Huang
作者：Bin Wu、Wenfang Deng、Zhigang Gui 和 Li Huang 二维 (2D) 范德华 (vdW) 材料中磁有序的非易失性操纵为先进自旋电子学应用提供了一条有前途的途径。双层 CrI₃ (BL-CrI₃) 表现出层间反铁磁 (AFM) 基态，与… [Phys. Rev. B 113, 134414] 2026 年 4 月 8 日星期三发布

item.title: Spin-MInt算法：非绝热动力学自旋映射表示的精确辛传播子
item.description:
📚 The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue
该工作提出了Spin-MInt算法，直接传播自旋映射变量而无需转换为笛卡尔变量。针对映射到Bloch球自旋矢量的两能级系统，严格证明该算法通过正则变量变换保持辛结构。Spin-MInt具有对称、二阶、时间可逆、角度不变和几何结构保持等特性。在一维自旋-玻色模型中，该算法与MInt算法均满足刘维尔定理，提供二阶能量守恒，精度优于先前发表的算法。

item.title: 二维 ScXS2（X=Rh、Ta、Mo）单层中的拓扑电子态、超导性和铁磁性
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Haifei Qin and Hong Sun
作者：秦海飞和孙红 狄拉克点和范霍夫奇点（VHS）共存的二维（2D）材料为寻求高临界温度下的拓扑超导或铁磁性提供了一个有前景的平台。然而，将电子拓扑特性与超级相结合的理想例子...... [物理。 Rev. B 113, 155413] 2026 年 4 月 8 日星期三发布

item.title: 二维蜂窝 Kitaev 铁磁体中具有共存磁波和电子拓扑的可调谐陈绝缘体态
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Haozhou Cai, Zhiming Xu, Jian Wu, and Weiyi Pan
作者：蔡浩洲、徐志明、吴健和潘伟毅 磁性材料中拓扑磁子和电子的共存为开发低耗散、多功能自旋电子器件提供了一条引人注目的途径。然而，能够同时实现和控制它们的材料系统在很大程度上仍未得到探索。在这里，我们提出...... [物理。 Rev. B 113, 134413] 2026 年 4 月 8 日星期三发布

item.title: Synergy of Triphase Interface Engineering and Electronic Modulation of Carbon Nitride Networks for Continuous‐Flow Photosynthesis of H2O2
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Xiaoying Peng, Bin Lei, Zongxing Tu, Mao He, Qin Luo, Tianle Ding, Suqin Wu, Guiming Peng
